title: Vulkan Shader in TOSA Custom Operation Attributes
description: Schema describing attributes for embedding a Vulkan shader inside a TOSA custom operation. This includes entry point definition, workgroup configuration, shader source or binary (SPIR-V), and Vulkan resource binding metadata.

entry_point.description: Name of the shader's entry point.

push_constants.description: (Optional) Comma-separated list of "key: size" pairs representing push constant name and size in bytes (e.g. "const1: 4, const2: 8").

shader_code.description: (Optional) Shader code. Validation depends on shader_language.

^(input|output)_(0|[1-9]\\d*)_vkformat$.description: Vulkan format of the indexed input/output.

^(input|output)_(0|[1-9]\\d*)_vkdescript.description: Vulkan descriptor set type of the indexed input/output. Must follow Vulkan naming convention.

^(input|output)_(0|[1-9]\\d*)_type$.description: Resource type of the indexed input/output (e.g. Tensor, Image, Buffer).

^(input|output)_(0|[1-9]\\d*)_binding$.description: Binding id of the indexed input/output.

^(input|output)_(0|[1-9]\\d*)_descriptor.description: Descriptor set index of the indexed input/output.
